edges.evidence_quote: Famous for spawning a strong Latino political organization in the late 1960s called the Young Lords
edges.context: Latin Eagles spawned the Young Lords as a political offshoot.
Latin Eagles are allied with Folk Nation.
Latin Eagles are rivals of Gangster Disciples.
Latin Eagles are rivals of People Nation.
Latin Eagles are rivals of Spanish Gangster Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: disputes over Northside turf made the Latin Eagles mortal enemies with the Latin Kings
edges.context: Latin Eagles and Latin Kings are mortal enemies over turf.

edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles, Latin Kings and Harrison Gents all fought for control of Lakeview High School
edges.context: Latin Eagles fought Harrison Gents for control of Lakeview High School.

edges.evidence_quote: disputes over Northside turf made the Latin Eagles mortal enemies with the Latin Kings and PR Stones
edges.context: Latin Eagles are mortal enemies with PR Stones.

edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles became enemies of all People gangs when they joined the prison Folks alliance of Larry Hoover and his Black Gangster Disciples
edges.context: Latin Eagles joined Folk Nation alliance alongside Black Gangster Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: the Almighty Latin Eagles formed an alliance with the Almighty Imperial Gangsters and Simon City Royals as the Almighty Folks Familia
edges.context: Latin Eagles allied with Simon City Royals as part of Almighty Folks Familia.

edges.evidence_quote: the prison Folks alliance of Larry Hoover and his Black Gangster Disciples, Simon City Royals, Ashland Vikings, Latin Disciples and others
edges.context: Latin Eagles were part of Folk Nation alliance with Ashland Vikings.

edges.evidence_quote: the prison Folks alliance of Larry Hoover and his Black Gangster Disciples, Simon City Royals, Ashland Vikings, Latin Disciples and others
edges.context: Latin Eagles were part of Folk Nation alliance with Latin Disciples.

edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Eagles became enemies of all People gangs when they joined the prison Folks alliance ... On the street, The Latin Eagles were members of ULO ... and became Folks alongside their ULO brothers; the Latin Disciples, Spanish Cobras, and Imperial Gangsters.
edges.context: Latin Eagles were allied with Spanish Cobras as part of ULO and Folk Nation.

edges.evidence_quote: the Almighty Latin Eagles formed an alliance with the Almighty Imperial Gangsters and Simon City Royals as the Almighty Folks Familia
edges.context: Latin Eagles allied with Imperial Gangsters as part of Almighty Folks Familia.

edges.evidence_quote: This was the beginning of the Spanish Cobra-Latin Eagle conflict.
edges.context: Latin Eagles went to war with Spanish Cobras after a party dispute.

edges.evidence_quote: they would go into a permanent bloody war with the Insane Familia led by the Spanish Cobras and the Maniac Famila ran by the Maniac Latin Disciples
edges.context: Latin Eagles went to war with Maniac Latin Disciples (Latin Disciples).
edges.time_period: by the end of the decade

edges.evidence_quote: A war involving the Latin Eagles and the Gangster Disciples started in the summer of 1995
edges.context: Latin Eagles and Gangster Disciples went to war in 1995.

edges.evidence_quote: A war involving the Latin Eagles and the Gangster Disciples started in the summer of 1995 as SGD's moved into the hood
edges.context: Latin Eagles warred with Spanish Gangster Disciples (SGD's) in 1995.

edges.evidence_quote: the Eagles rode with Spanish Cobras and Maniac Latin Disciples who were in the process of conquering Kelvyn Park against the Stoned Freaks
edges.context: Latin Eagles fought against Stoned Freaks alongside allies.
